name: Hypno Office
description:
You're a downtrodden worker in an office, bullied by your boss Sandra and her PA, and dismissed by the HR manager.

You've acquired a copy of that hypno-app that's been going around, and now you're ready for some revenge...

CONTENT WARNING: This scenario is designed to include elements of compromised consent (via mind control), so if this isn't your thing, I advise giving this bot a miss.
creator: TuhiHypno
